name: Merge Ink
author: Poki
description: Merge Ink is a merge strategy game where you summon and place adorable ink slimes to wipe out vibrant paintings!️ Merge two identical slimes to unlock new colors, then position them wisely on the battlefield to match and erase the growing artwork. As levels get more complex and colorful, you’ll need smart planning and perfect placement to succeed. Ready to mix, merge, and clear every canvas? How to play Merge Ink? Click or tap to make the choice. Click and hold to move and merge slimes. Who created Merge Ink? Merge Ink is created by Neutronized. Check out their other games on Poki: Bufo Merge , Slime Laboratory , Roar Rampage , Slime Laboratory 2 , Snow Tale , Picnic Penguin , Magic Bridge , Lost Yeti , Yokai Dungeon , Mimelet , Drop Wizard Tower , Dyna Boy , Dino Quake , Shadow Trick , Double Panda and Slime Pizza ! How can I play Merge Ink for free? You can play Merge Ink for free on Poki. Can I play Merge Ink on mobile devices and desktop? Merge Ink can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
